Auction Calendar 2026

March

  • Alameda County, CA Tax Defaulted Properties Auction March 20th - 23rd
  • Mason County, WA Tax Foreclosed Properties Auction March 26th - 27th

April

  • MonroePATaxApr26 April 8th - 8th
  • Elko County, NV Tax Defaulted Properties Auction April 20th - 24th
  • Carson City Tax Defaulted Properties Auctions April 22nd - 22nd
  • Riverside County, CA Tax Defaulted Properties Auction April 23rd - 28th

May

  • Nye County, NV Tax Defaulted Properties Auction May 1st - 4th
  • Klickitat County, WA Tax Foreclosed Properties Auction May 12th - 13th
  • Klickitat County, WA Tax Title/Surplus Properties Auction May 12th - 13th
  • Monroe County, PA Repository May26 May 13th - 13th

June
